summary: An AI-powered athletic training coach that generates personalized training plans based on user goals, uploaded data, and feedback.

entities.name: User
entities.description: Represents a user of the application.

entities.name: Training Data
entities.description: Training data uploaded by the user.

entities.name: Workout
entities.description: A specific workout within the training plan.

entities.name: Workout Feedback
entities.description: User feedback on a specific workout.

user_flows.name: Create Profile
user_flows.description: User creates a profile with personal information.

user_flows.name: Generate Training Plan
user_flows.description: AI generates a day-by-day training plan.

user_flows.name: View Training Plan
user_flows.description: User views the training plan in a calendar format.

user_flows.name: Enter Workout Feedback
user_flows.description: User enters feedback on a specific workout.

pages.name: Profile Creation Page
pages.description: Page for creating a user profile.

pages.name: Goal Selection Page
pages.description: Page for selecting an athletic goal.

pages.name: Calendar Page
pages.description: Page displaying the training plan in a calendar format, with workout details for each day.

pages.name: Workout Feedback Page
pages.description: Page for entering feedback on a specific workout.

technical_requirements: AI model for training plan generation
Data ingestion and formatting from various sources (Strava, notes)
API endpoints for data access and manipulation
Background processing for AI model training and updates
